meta.purpose: Automation small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank. This file records source-backed findings before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only rows with explicit official/high-trust source support may be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity, incomplete result context, or inaccessible row-level source data must remain outside confirmed histories. Current-event Numata rows are event results, not prior histories for the same event-relative view.

batchScope.openPrCheck: No open PRs were found before this batch. Recent merged athlete research included Lot 41-45, so this batch continues with Lot 46-50 and avoids duplicate work. This batch adds an isolated research log only and does not touch app layout, runtime logic, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json.
batchScope.limitation: The official HPA D/E PDF URL is known from the previous batch source index, but row-level PDF extraction was not available in this run. Therefore no attempt numbers, bodyweights, placements, or past histories are promoted or asserted for Lot 46-50.
